title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IndiGo Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IndiGo Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
